name: Marcus by Goldman Sachs Cash Rewards

earning_rates.notes: 1x point per $1 on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: 0% intro APR
other_benefits.description: 0% introductory APR for 9 months on qualifying GM purchases over $499

other_benefits.name: No redemption limits
other_benefits.description: Points do not expire; earnings valid for 7 years

sources.notes: Hustler Money Blog — card bonuses history
Reddit discussion — confirms GM Rewards via Marcus
Marcus GM card rates and fees page

notes: The Marcus by Goldman Sachs credit card was a GM co-branded card. The card was previously issued by Goldman Sachs but the program has since moved to Barclays (My GM Rewards Mastercard as of 2025). The Marcus GM card earned 4x points on GM purchases and 1x elsewhere. Note: GM Rewards Mastercard (Barclays) now supersedes this card as of May 2025. Some sources suggest Marcus card may be discontinued for new applications.
